allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\neupe\\hunde-training\\.claude" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, @{Name="Type"; Expression={if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { "DIR" } else { "FILE" }}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\neupe\\hunde-training\\.claude" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{Name="Type"; Expression={if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { "DIR" } else { "FILE" }}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\neupe\\hunde-training\\app\\src" -Depth 1 -Force | Select-Object Name, @{Name="Type"; Expression={if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { "DIR" } else { "FILE" }}} | Sort-Object Name)

hooks.command: powershell -Command "$report = 'c:\\Users\\neupe\\hunde-training\\SECURITY_REPORT.md'; if (!(Test-Path $report)) { Write-Host '[SECURITY] WARNUNG: SECURITY_REPORT.md fehlt. Bitte /security-scan ausfuehren.' } else { $age = (Get-Date) - (Get-Item $report).LastWriteTime; if ($age.Days -gt 14) { Write-Host ('[SECURITY] WARNUNG: Security Report ist ' + $age.Days + ' Tage alt. Bitte /security-scan vor dem Push ausfuehren.') } else { Write-Host ('[SECURITY] Security Report aktuell (' + [int]$age.TotalHours + 'h alt). OK.') } }"
